HYPNOSISCREATOR-HC_STRIKE.title: Strike
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HC_DEFEND.title: Defend
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COUNT_BEAT.title: Count Beat
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PLEASURE_CYCLE.title: Pleasure Cycle
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PLEASURE_CYCLE.descripti: Apply {Doom:diff()} Doom. If the target is Tranced, apply {Doom:diff()} Doom again.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HEART_CLAIM.title: Heart Claim
HYPNOSISCREATOR-COOKING_HYPNOSIS.title: Cooking Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DIGITAL_SIGN.title: Digital Sign
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DIGITAL_SIGN.description: Reduce the cost of {Cards:diff()} cards in your hand by 1 this combat.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MORE_EFFORT.title: More Effort
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MORE_EFFORT.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Reduce the cost of all copies of this card by 1 this combat.
[gold]Count[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FOOL_SEEKS_PEACE.title: Fool Seeks Peace
HYPNOSISCREATOR-EAT_ME.title: Eat Me
HYPNOSISCREATOR-OSHI_LOG.title: Oshi Log
HYPNOSISCREATOR-FINGER_SNAP.title: Finger Snap
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HARMONY.title: Harmony
HYPNOSISCREATOR-HARMONY.description: Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the target's attack intent.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MIRRORING.title: Mirroring
HYPNOSISCREATOR-MIRRORING.description:
Deal damage equal to the target's attack intent.
Playable only if they intend to Attack.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STUN_GUN.title: Stun Gun
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SAY_YOURE_SORRY.title: Say You're Sorry?
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WRIST_CUT.title: Wrist Cut
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BEGINNER_HYPNOSIS.title: Beginner Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BEGINNER_HYPNOSIS.descri: [gold]Count[/gold]. Apply {Doom:diff()} Doom. Plant fetishes from the next {PlantCards:diff()} Fetish card(s) played on the target. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DEEP_BREATH.title: Deep Breath
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PREFINGER.title: Foreplay
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSITIVITY3000.title: Sensitivity x3000
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SENSITIVITY3000.descript:
Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
This turn, the enemy takes triple damage.
[gold]Always hits Fetish[/gold] (SM, DomSub, Abnormal).
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BREATH_CONTROL.title: Breath Control
HYPNOSISCREATOR-BREATH_CONTROL.descripti:
This turn, whenever you play a card, the target loses 1 Strength.
If their attack value is 0, [gold]Stun[/gold] them.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ZERO_OUT.title: Zero Out
HYPNOSISCREATOR-ZERO_OUT.description:
Remove all Block from the enemy. Set their Strength to 0 this turn. Apply {Trance:diff()} Trance.
[gold]Count[/gold].
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DRUG_HYPNOSIS.title: Drug Hypnosis
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DRUG_HYPNOSIS.descriptio:
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} Poison, {Doom:diff()} Doom, {StrengthLoss:diff()} less Strength, {WeakPower:diff()} Weak, {FrailPower:diff()} Frail, and {Bog:diff()} Bog.
[gold]Count[/gold]. [gold]Fetish: Abnormal[/gold]
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SPANKING.title: Spanking
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SPANKING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
If Fetish hits, [gold]Replay[/gold].
[gold]Fetish: SM[/gold]
HYPNOSISCREATOR-METRONOME_CARD.title: Metronome
HYPNOSISCREATOR-GAZE_LIGHT.title: Gaze Light
HYPNOSISCREATOR-DISCIPLINE.title: Discipline
HYPNOSISCREATOR-STARE.title: Stare
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KICK.title: Kick
HYPNOSISCREATOR-KICK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Awaken SM and DomSub.
[gold]Fetish: DomSub[/gold]
HYPNOSISCREATOR-PETTING.title: Petting
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WHISPER.title: Whisper
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WHISPER.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} Fetish card(s) in your hand. Awaken their fetishes on the target.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-WHISPER.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to awaken fetishes from.
HYPNOSISCREATOR-SOFT_TECHNIQUE.title: Soft Technique
